## Migration Impact

Does this issue involve persisted data, Flyway migrations, or existing records? State `None` when it does not.

## Validation

## Screenshots or Logs

Attach redacted screenshots or relevant non-sensitive logs when they clarify the issue. Do not include credentials, tokens, private URLs, or production data.
